subject: Sponsorship offer from {sponsor}
body:
We have received a sponsorship proposal from {sponsor}.

The offer is worth €{amount} annually. This would be a valuable addition to our finances.

Would you like to accept this sponsorship?

es.subject: Oferta de patrocinio de {sponsor}
es.body:
Hemos recibido una propuesta de patrocinio de {sponsor}.

La oferta es de €{amount} anuales. Sería una valiosa adición a nuestras finanzas.

¿Desea aceptar este patrocinio?
